The '''YT-700''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufactured by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]. It was one of the first [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] of the [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]]. The ''[[Jackpot]]'' was a heavily modified YT-700.

{{Ship-stub}}
